sources.title: Ricky – Normal was yesterday (full film in German, free family films, drama films)
Ricky – Normal war gestern (ganzer Film Deutsch, Filme auf Deutsch, ganze Filme in voller Länge)

metadata.Plot: Katie, a single mother living in France with her daughter Lisa, struggles to make ends meet while working at a chemical factory. There, she meets Paco, a co-worker from Spain. Soon, they move in together, and Katie becomes pregnant. Katie gives birth to a baby boy, named Ricky, and she and Paco raise him together in their tiny apartment, along with Lisa. However, it soon becomes apparent that Ricky is no ordinary baby; he develops a pair of functioning wings and becomes able to fly. Soon he is flitting about in their tiny apartment, and together Katie and Paco struggle to raise and handle the ever-growing Ricky.
metadata.Writer: Emmanuèle Bernheim, François Ozon, Rose Tremain
metadata.Actors: Alexandra Lamy, Sergi López, Mélusine Mayance
